mapper.select:
SELECT ips.id, ips.bond_code AS bondCode, ips.bond_short_name AS bondShortName, ips.adjuster_name AS adjusterName, ips.entry_time AS entryTime, ips.target_pool_name AS targetPoolName, ips.bond_type AS bondType, mbp.id AS myBondPoolId, bi.b_info_couponrate AS couponRate, bi.b_info_issuer AS issuer, bi.b_info_fullname AS fullName, bi.b_issue_firstissue AS issueDate, bi.b_info_carrydate AS carryDate, bi.b_info_maturitydate AS maturityDate, bi.b_info_delistdate AS delistDate, bi.b_info_repurchasedate AS repurchaseDate FROM ip_pool_status ips LEFT JOIN sirm_bondinfo bi ON ips.bond_code = bi.s_info_code LEFT JOIN my_bond_pool mbp ON ips.bond_code = mbp.security_code AND mbp.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND mbp.status = 'use'
ips.is_deleted = 0 AND ips.audit_status = '20'
AND bi.b_info_maturitydate >= CURDATE()
AND bi.b_info_maturitydate < CURDATE()
AND ips.target_pool_id IN
#{pid}
AND ips.bond_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bondCode}, '%')
AND ips.bond_type = #{bondType}
AND ips.entry_time >= #{entryTimeStart}
AND ips.entry_time <= #{entryTimeEnd}
AND ips.adjuster_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{adjusterName}, '%')
AND bi.b_info_issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
AND mbp.id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ips.entry_time DESC, ips.id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT bond_type FROM ip_pool_status WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND audit_status = '20' AND bond_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY bond_type ASC
